subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-11-10 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: About 38 years ago a few Hajis who were natives of Yazd came to Acca. On their way they were stripped clean
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @goodly deeds; actions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
